newsSince: No material company-specific news in the June 9-23 window. The bullish data (Q1 2026 sales +19% to $657M, raised outlook, industrial +45% on grid/data-center plus the transformative Basler acquisition, May 14 Investor Day) all predates June 9 and was already reflected in the prior case. June price action is flow-driven.

sources.label: Littelfuse Q1 2026 results, raises outlook (Globe & Mail)
Littelfuse 2026 Investor Day growth strategy (Globe & Mail)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the residual-alpha-vs-passives lens, nothing new since June 9. The data-center/grid protection story is real but fully recognized (+80% YTD, rising HF ownership, Strong Buy consensus), so LFUS stays a crowded rerated benchmark rather than hidden alpha. Hold at rank 19.
verdicts.bull: Power protection + current-sense content rises with data-center power density; raised outlook, Basler accretion.
verdicts.neutral: Strategically important but already rerated; consensus has it.
verdicts.bear: +80% YTD, crowded ownership; little residual alpha left on a crowding-penalized list.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Data-center protection product ramp; further M&A synergy.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding/valuation unwind on any industrial-cycle wobble.

verdicts.rankRationale: Node is validated (industrial +45% on data-center/grid) but the 'latent' premise keeps eroding as the AI-power-protection story is now widely told. No new evidence June 9-23, so no further promotion; hold at rank 24.
verdicts.bull: Circuit protection/sensors scale with data-center power density and edge devices.
verdicts.neutral: Validated node, but discovery premium is gone.
verdicts.bear: Widely owned; latent thesis fading with Strong Buy consensus.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Power-semi recovery and data-center protection demand.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Loss of 'latent' status caps re-rating upside.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: no new fundamental info since June 9. The audit already balanced genuine power-delivery/protection content against a fully recognized +80% YTD rerating at ~$11.8B cap. Hold at rank 40.
verdicts.bull: Board-level PDN, MLCC/inductor, power-semi content across AI servers.
verdicts.neutral: Real content, but valuation reflects it.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Multiple compression after the YTD run.
